examples: The steamer Swadeshi had fouled the Howrah bridge and sunk.
Then one day came the news that the steamer Swadeshi had fouled the Howrah bridge and sunk.
India never fully Shared Gandhi's dream of a small-scale, self-sufficient economy, its swadeshi (own-country) garments made of hand-spun yarn hand-woven on home looms.
It still wants a temple built at Ayodhya, and it still preaches swadeshi (economic nationalism).
In doing so, it has abandoned most of the Hindu-nationalist nostrums of swadeshi (self-reliance) that it used to proclaim.
